approaches.label: Foreign currency hedge of an intragroup monetary item
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies foreign currency risk of an intragroup monetary item as a hedged item in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge of a forecast intragroup transaction
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies cash flow hedge accounting for foreign currency risk on a forecast intragroup transaction in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context separately identifies hedge accounting for foreign currency risk arising from a net investment in a foreign operation.
